author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

The Golden Carnival is BACK with $4,000,000 in Loot

Welcome to a new era of prosperity. 

The Golden Carnival is back and bigger than ever-now with $4,000,000 in Star Atlas loot up for grabs from November 1 - February 21.  Start getting Golden Tickets, submit them into weekly loot drops and see if the cosmic currents favor you.  

How to join the Golden Carnival:
  Craft Golden Tickets in SAGE Labs starting now or get Golden Tickets from other players
  Submit Golden Tickets to weekly loots drops on Hedgehog (Link coming early next week)
  Tune in every Friday at 10am PT / 1pm ET in ⁠Golden Carnival Loot Drops to see if you win!

 | Learn more about the Golden Carnival and the Loot Roadmap here: Article Link
